with_check: (has_role(( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid), 'admin'::app_role) OR (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = user_id))

policyname: Users can update profiles based on permissions
qual: can_manage_user(( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid), user_id)
with_check: can_manage_user(( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid), user_id)

policyname: Users can view profiles from their tenant
qual:
((tenant_id = ( SELECT profiles_1.tenant_id
   FROM profiles profiles_1
  WHERE (profiles_1.user_id = auth.uid())
 LIMIT 1)) OR (auth.uid() = user_id) OR (( SELECT profiles_1.is_platform_admin
   FROM profiles profiles_1
  WHERE (profiles_1.user_id = auth.uid())
 LIMIT 1) = true))
